title: Black pvp [z_xp]
description: Some of the PvP items have changed and become darker, but the basic principles of the items have not been lost and the items are very recognizable as before.
body:
# 🌑 Black PvP [z_xp]: The Apex Competitive Resource Pack
**A Premium Aesthetic Solution Engineered by Z.XP**

Welcome to **Black PvP**, the ultimate high-performance resource pack designed for the elite competitor. Crafted with a focus on **zero visual obstruction** and **maximum combat clarity**, this pack implements a sleek, high-contrast dark theme. As our flagship competitive project, Black PvP is constantly evolving and receives regular major updates to remain the definitive choice for serious players.

📞 **Direct Contact & Support**  
* Creator Profile (Modrinth): [https://modrinth.com/user/z_xp](https://modrinth.com/user/z_xp)  
* Official Telegram Channel: [https://t.me/k269he](https://t.me/k269he)  
* Support Email: modpacks.max@gmail.com  

<details>
<summary>1. ⚔️ Implemented/Supported Features</summary>

All the core features and modifications are listed in detail on the **official changelog** and **gallery** on Modrinth.  
Please check them directly for the most up-to-date information:

- [View full Changelog](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-pvp-z_xp/changelog)  
- [View Gallery & Screenshots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-pvp-z_xp/gallery)

This ensures you always see the latest additions, refinements, and visual examples.

</details>

<details>
<summary>2. 🔮 Upcoming Features</summary>

Community! I have ZERO ideas right now – you guys MUST hit me up so we can turn this pack into God Mode! 💥

📋 Definitely check the changelog and gallery to see what's been newly added/fixed – you'll be shocked how far we've come! 👀

💡 Got a suggestion or feature you want? Drop it right away through these channels:

Telegram: https://t.me/k269he

Email: modpacks.max@gmail.com

We'll add it in the fastest time possible – 100% promise! ⚡ Your input = next update!


</details>

<details>
<summary>3. 📄 Terms of Use</summary>

<details>
<summary>Full Terms</summary>

By downloading and using **Black PvP**, you agree to the following:  

- **Personal Use Only**: This pack is for non-commercial, personal Minecraft gameplay. Redistribution or resale is prohibited without explicit written permission from the creator.  

- **Credit Required**: If showcasing in videos/streams/servers, credit Z.XP.XP.900 and link to the Modrinth page.  

- **No Modifications**: Do not edit or repackage the pack without permission—contact via support channels for collaborations.  

- **Compatibility**: Tested on Minecraft 1.3.x–1.21.x (optimal on 1.21.x). Use with OptiFine or similar for best results; no guarantees on mod conflicts. Report bugs via Telegram/Email.  

- **Updates**: Free updates for existing users; major changes may require re-download.  

- **Liability**: Use at your own risk—no liability for gameplay issues. Creator reserves rights to discontinue support.  

For questions, reach out via support links above!

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>4. 📊 Performance & Compatibility</summary>

- Supports **1.3.x–1.21.x** (optimal on recent versions).  
- **Zero performance impact**—lightweight textures only.  
- Latest version and full details available on Modrinth.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🌍 Multilingual Support / Mehrsprachige Unterstützung</summary>

<details>
